message.thinking:
We need to evaluate the given text against three questions: Chapters, Description, Structure. Provide JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has "question": "Chapters" or "Description" or "Structure". Provide feedback: highlight problems or strengths. "complies": true/false.

We need to check the text: "Šis pētījums ir nozīmīgs gam akadēmiskajā vidē gan arī praktiskajā tehnoloģiju attīstībā, jo decentralizēto finanšu sistēmu izaugsme prasa jaunas un efektīvas pieejas."

This is a single sentence. It does not list main sections, does not describe contents, nor give structure. So all three questions: does not comply. Provide feedback accordingly.

Thus:

{
"question":"Chapters",
"feedback":"The text does not list any chapters or sections; it only provides a general statement about significance.",
"complies":false
}

Similarly for Description: no description of contents. For Structure: no structure.

Return array.
